name: oh-my-gjc
description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite with 8 skills and 11 commands. Skills: adaptive-response, no-english, time-left, extragoal, insane-review, lazycodex-gjc, deep-onboarding, preset-pack. Commands: /omg, /omg:setup, /omg:gate, /omg:gate-always, /omg:no-english, /omg:time-left, /omg:fable, /omg:insane-review, /omg:lazycodex-gjc, /omg:deep-onboarding, /omg:preset-pack. Preset-pack merges the curated daily/deep/sec seat-map profiles into the user's models.yml only on explicit /omg:preset-pack invocation, after backup, name-scoped, leaving all other profiles and top-level keys untouched. The installer itself never modifies models.yml.
